name: vyges-clkmgr-lite
description: Lightweight clock manager with native TL-UL slave interface. Per-clock integer dividers, software-controlled gating, and glitch-free output.

registers.name: CLK_EN
registers.description: Per-clock gate enable (1 = enabled). Bits [NUM_CLOCKS-1:0] are valid.

registers.name: CLK_STATUS
registers.description: Per-clock active status. Bits [NUM_CLOCKS-1:0] are valid.

registers.name: CLK_DIV0
registers.description: Clock 0 divider. Bits [7:0]: 0 = div-by-1, N = div-by-(N+1).

registers.name: CLK_DIV1
registers.description: Clock 1 divider. Bits [7:0]: 0 = div-by-1, N = div-by-(N+1).

registers.name: CLK_DIV2
registers.description: Clock 2 divider. Bits [7:0]: 0 = div-by-1, N = div-by-(N+1).

registers.name: CLK_DIV3
registers.description: Clock 3 divider. Bits [7:0]: 0 = div-by-1, N = div-by-(N+1).
